form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months 3rd of 9 at this track on March 28 over 1200m, 8 len behind Red Warrior with 57.5kg at $1.80. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at Hawkesbury Super Mdn-Sw on July 3 over 1300m, slow going 2.75 len behind Cross Tasman with 59kg at $5.50. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second of 16 at Gowran Park October 20 over 1408m, in the wet; 0.5 len behind Ribee with 58kg at $9. Previously first up; third of 14 at Dundalk All Weather March 21 2025 over 1408m, 3 len behind Currawood carrying 61kg at $4. Expected to play a major role.
